authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P177 POWER_LOTTO R2 closure decision review

executive_summary.honest_statement: R1 and R2 POWER_LOTTO research has produced a definitive NULL result. This is not a failure of process — it is a genuine scientific finding that POWER_LOTTO draws are consistent with a fair random process across all evaluated analytical approaches. No strategy is deployable. No champion promotion is allowed. No wagering recommendation is issued. No win guarantee is made.
executive_summary.fair_random_consistency: Results are consistent with fair-random lottery behavior across 1913 draws and all 17 evaluated strategies/candidates.

evidence_summary.description: 10 existing POWER_LOTTO strategies evaluated on 36,104 rows / 1,551 distinct draws
evidence_summary.result: Zero strategies survive Bonferroni/BH correction (family=40). Pool mean +0.020 above random, no corrected significance.
Module F final gate FAILED — OOS Window 2 below random; ensemble did not consistently beat random across OOS windows.

evidence_summary.description: 5 threshold sensitivity scenarios + 2 signal tracking targets
evidence_summary.result: Window 2 below random at ALL sensitivity thresholds (S1-S3). Signal is non-stationary. P167 NULL strengthened.

evidence_summary.description: C01 weighted recency freq, C02 gap-adjusted overdue, C04 zone-balanced freq evaluated on n_oos=1413
evidence_summary.result: C01 p_bonf=0.803, C02 p_bonf=0.711, C04 p_bonf=0.681 — all FAIL_CORRECTED (threshold=0.0167)

evidence_summary.description: C03 co-occurrence graph, C05 dispersion, C06 CUSUM regime, C07 hybrid aggregation evaluated on n_oos=1413
evidence_summary.result: C03 p_bonf=1.000, C05 p_bonf=1.000 (BELOW random −0.013), C06 p_bonf=1.000, C07 p_bonf=0.292 — all FAIL_CORRECTED (threshold=0.0125)
17 strategies/candidates evaluated, 0 corrected-significant OOS edge. POWER_LOTTO consistent with fair random process.

decision_options.label: FORMALLY_CLOSE_R2_POWER_LOTTO_RESEARCH
decision_options.description: Formally close all active POWER_LOTTO strategy research (R1 and R2). Archive all research artifacts. No further feature engineering or prototype development in POWER_LOTTO without a structural change to the draw process.
decision_options.rationale: 17 strategies/candidates across 2 research rounds all NULL. Cumulative multiple-testing burden is high. Adding more candidates without new theoretical motivation risks false-positive inflation. POWER_LOTTO 1913-draw history is consistent with fair random (consistent with L91/BIG_LOTTO findings). The research has been conducted rigorously and exhaustively given the data available.
post_closure_actions: Archive all P161-P177 artifacts in outputs/research/power_lotto/
Mark POWER_LOTTO strategy research as CLOSED in roadmap
Retain historical replay infrastructure for transparency and reporting
Monitor for structural changes: new pool size, rule change, regime shift in data distribution
conditions_for_reopening: Documented structural change to draw process (pool size, rule change)
External evidence of predictable signal from independent source
New pre-registered hypothesis with explicit null hypothesis and power calculation

decision_options.label: LONG_TERM_MONITORING_ONLY
decision_options.description: Pause active research. Maintain passive monitoring of new POWER_LOTTO draws. Trigger re-evaluation only when >=500 new draws are available after 115000041.
decision_options.rationale: Low cost. Preserves option to revisit with larger OOS window. C07 hybrid aggregation showed best performance (p_bonf=0.292) — not significant but higher than others. With 500 new draws, SE would be ~35% lower, potentially revealing marginal signal. Monitoring does not require new strategies.
monitoring_conditions: Re-evaluation must use PRE-REGISTERED configs from P173/P176
No new strategy candidates added without separate authorization
decision_options.cost: Near-zero — passive monitoring only, no implementation

decision_options.label: SWITCH_RESEARCH_FOCUS
decision_options.description: Redirect research resources to other high-value areas: replay product completeness (main/zen-gates reconciliation), DAILY_539 monitoring, UI coverage improvements, or governance backlog.
decision_options.rationale: The main/zen-gates split remains unresolved — merging the 40,462-row difference is a governance task with clear business value. UI coverage and API improvements benefit all lottery types. These are tractable near-term wins.
suggested_focus_areas: P163/P164 reconcile plan execution (main/zen-gates merge, 40462 rows)

decision_options.label: CONTINUE_EXHAUSTIVE_SEARCH
decision_options.description: Continue adding new POWER_LOTTO feature engineering candidates without new theoretical hypothesis.
decision_options.rationale_for_rejection: All 7 R2 feature types already cover the major signal classes: frequency, recency, gap/overdue, dispersion, zone balance, regime, co-occurrence, hybrid aggregation. Adding more candidates without a new structural hypothesis primarily inflates multiple-testing burden and increases Type I error risk. The pattern of 17 NULL results is not consistent with a case where more testing would reveal signal.
risks: Multiple testing: each additional family increases probability of spurious positive
P-hacking risk: selecting thresholds or windows post-hoc to find nominal significance
Overfitting: historical data-driven strategies do not generalize in a fair-random process
Resource cost: each prototype round requires significant governance overhead
decision_options.if_ceo_requires_continuation: If continued search is required despite evidence, P178 must first design an exploratory research governance framework defining: pre-registration requirements, maximum family size, stopping rules, and independent validation protocol. P178 must be plan-only. No new prototype without explicit governance design.

cto_recommendation.primary: Option A — formally close R2 active research
cto_recommendation.secondary: Option B — keep passive long-term monitoring for new draws
cto_recommendation.recommendation_text: The CTO recommends formally closing R2 POWER_LOTTO active research and switching monitoring to passive-only mode. 17 strategies across 2 research rounds returned zero corrected-significant OOS edge. POWER_LOTTO draws are consistent with a fair random process given available data. Further active feature engineering is not warranted without new structural evidence. The main/zen-gates split remains unresolved — that governance debt has higher business value than additional POWER_LOTTO research rounds.
cto_recommendation.not_recommended: Option D without P178 governance design. Continuing exhaustive search increases multiple testing burden and Type I error risk without new theoretical motivation.
cto_recommendation.historical_replay_value: Historical replay infrastructure remains valuable for transparency, audit, and stakeholder confidence — even with NULL research results. It demonstrates that strategies were evaluated fairly and honestly.
cto_recommendation.main_zen_gates_split_note: main/zen-gates split (40,462 row delta) remains unresolved and is independent of research closure. Reconciliation should be prioritized separately.

authorization_options.effect: Formally closes R2. Archives all P161-P177 artifacts. No further active research unless structural change.

authorization_options.effect: Suspends active research. Sets up passive monitoring for new POWER_LOTTO draws (>=500 threshold).

authorization_options.phrase: YES switch focus to replay product governance backlog
authorization_options.effect: Redirects resources to main/zen-gates reconciliation and replay product improvements.

authorization_options.phrase: YES start P178 exploratory research governance design only
authorization_options.effect: NOT RECOMMENDED. Requires P178 plan-only governance design before any new prototype. No direct continuation.

honest_language_requirements.null_is_not_process_failure: This is a NULL result, not a failure of process. The research was conducted rigorously and honestly.
honest_language_requirements.no_strategy_is_deployable: No strategy is deployable. No corrected-significant OOS edge was found in 17 evaluated candidates.
honest_language_requirements.no_champion_promotion: No champion promotion is allowed based on these research results.
honest_language_requirements.no_wagering_recommendation: No wagering recommendation is issued. No wager guidance is provided.
honest_language_requirements.no_win_guarantee: No win guarantee is made. No guaranteed improvement in lottery outcomes is claimed.
honest_language_requirements.fair_random_consistency: Results are consistent with fair-random lottery behavior across all evaluated approaches.
honest_language_requirements.historical_replay_value: Historical replay infrastructure remains valuable for transparency, but not as evidence of predictable edge.
